title: Align RPL/DAO sections (8.x) with no-ULA 02xx model
description: Review and update all DODAG, DAO, prefix routing, Target Option, and source routing logic in sections 8.x of spec/05-routing.md. Remove any assumptions about ULA prefixes or GUA. Ensure DAO Origin Signature, generalized targets, and downward routing use primary 02xx addresses consistently. Update examples and tables.
close_reason: Aligned RPL/DAO sections 8.x in spec/05-routing.md with no-ULA 02xx primary address model. Updated routing decision, DAO target descriptions, generalized prefixes, source routing logic, examples, and tables to consistently use primary 02xx addresses, removed all ULA/GUA assumptions. Verified with rpl_route_state test vectors.
